summary: Re-verification of SEC-003 fix complete. Confirmed server.py:236 now uses PUBLIC_WORKER_EXCLUDE projection on GET /api/workers/recommendations. Re-ran the full SEC test suite (test_security_fixes.py) — 20/20 PASSED with no regressions. The previously failing test (TestSEC003WorkerPII::test_recommendations_no_pii) now passes, confirming phone/user_id are no longer leaked. The other three PII tests (list/popular/detail) still pass. Booking end-to-end flow (register worker → create booking → accept → start → worker complete-by-worker → customer confirm → review → duplicate-review blocked) also re-verified green.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:236 fix is correct — db.workers.find(q, PUBLIC_WORKER_EXCLUDE) properly projects out phone/user_id/_id even before the LLM ranking path returns results.

Minor (not blocking): pytest warning about class-scoped fixture defined as instance method in TestSEC001BookingStateMachine — works today but deprecated in pytest 10. Convert booking_ctx to @classmethod when time permits.
seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed invoked by session-scoped fixture (demo customer + workers); fresh test worker registered with TEST_worker_<uuid>@example.com prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEC-001..SEC-005 fixes all verified green. Use /app/backend/tests/test_security_fixes.py as the regression suite. Demo creds: demo@labour.app / demo1234. Fresh workers are auto-created per test session.
rca_of_issue: Previous iteration_2.json had GET /api/workers/recommendations returning phone & user_id because line 236 used projection `{"_id": 0}` which only excluded mongo _id. Fix: replaced with `PUBLIC_WORKER_EXCLUDE` (the shared projection constant that also strips phone & user_id). Re-test confirmed no PII leakage.
